steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The claim states the speaker has “contradictory feelings” — opposite emotions occurring at the same time during the spring experience. We need a quotation that captures this internal conflict, not just pleasant observation.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice D directly illustrates the contradiction: the speaker is in “a sweet mood” experiencing beautiful natural sounds, yet “pleasant thoughts / Bring sad thoughts to the mind,” showing both positive and negative emotions simultaneously. The other three quotations show only positive reactions to nature without capturing any sadness or internal conflict. That matches choice D — D is correct.
